title: orphan-sweep Stop-hook activation
description: Add a flag-gated, default-off fallback in session-cleanup.sh so that when no CLAUDE_SESSION_PID is available (the harness never sets it, and guessing from PPID is refused as a cross-session-kill risk) the Stop hook can delegate to the existing orphan-only orphan-mcp-sweeper.sh, which reaps only ownerless (reparented) MCP daemons and so can never touch a live session. SPECKIT_STOP_HOOK_ORPHAN_SWEEP: off (default no-op), dry-run (log only), 1/on/live (reap); sweeper failures are swallowed so they cannot break the hook. Fourth of the deferred daemon-reliability hardening items from phase 017; enabling live reaping is an operator decision after a dry-run review.
